mapper.sql: d.id, d.region_id, r.name AS region_name, d.name, d.dormitory_type, d.address, d.daily_rate, d.sort_order, d.version, d.created_at, d.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT , COUNT(DISTINCT rm.id) AS total_rooms, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rh.id IS NOT NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE()) AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL THEN rm.id END) AS occupied_rooms FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN regions r ON r.id = d.region_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN rooms rm ON rm.dormitory_id = d.id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN residence_histories rh ON rh.room_id = rm.id AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY d.id, d.region_id, r.name, d.name, d.dormitory_type, d.address, d.daily_rate, d.sort_order, d.version, d.created_at, d.updated_at

SELECT d.id, d.region_id, d.name, d.dormitory_type, d.address, d.daily_rate, d.sort_order, d.version, d.created_at, d.updated_at, d.deleted_at FROM dormitories d WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dormitories (region_id, name, dormitory_type, address, daily_rate, sort_order, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{regionId}, #{name}, #{dormitoryType}, #{address}, #{dailyRate}, #{sortOrder}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitories SET region_id = #{regionId}, name = #{name}, dormitory_type = #{dormitoryType}, address = #{address}, daily_rate = #{dailyRate}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, version = version + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE dormitories SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rooms WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT d.id, d.region_id, r.name AS region_name, d.name, d.dormitory_type, d.address, d.daily_rate, d.sort_order, d.version, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM dormitories d LEFT JOIN regions r ON r.id = d.region_id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE d.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY d.sort_order ASC, d.id ASC
SELECT d.dormitory_type FROM rooms rm JOIN dormitories d ON d.id = rm.dormitory_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rm.id = #{roomId} AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM residence_histories rh JOIN rooms rm ON rm.id = rh.room_id AND rm.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE rm.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND rh.check_out_date IS NULL AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE dormitories SET dormitory_type = #{dormitoryType}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rooms SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
